title: Stop a catch block from swallowing a thrown error
task: `npm test` fails: `lookup` in src/registry.js wraps its body in a try/catch that swallows the RangeError it throws for a missing key and returns `undefined` instead, so a real miss is indistinguishable from a stored `undefined`. Fix the error handling so the RangeError propagates to the caller, while the happy path still returns the stored value (including a value that is itself `undefined`). Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
notes: The swallowing catch masks a thrown RangeError. file_not_contains removes the error-swallowing catch body; the test pin keeps the propagation assertion from being deleted.
